Day advanced to 2026-03-12.
10,194 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
60 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 2 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-13): ['503104', '657160']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-11 -> 2026-03-12)

- "In which country will US officials say a base is located where an Iranian missile strike damaged five KC-135 refuelling aircraft by March 19, 2026?" → Saudi Arabia
- "What Iranian island will Donald Trump say US forces bombed military installations on by March 14, 2026?" → Kharg island
- "What ship will be named as carrying about 3,500 US military personnel to the Middle East by March 31, 2026?" → USS Tripoli
- "Which southern Lebanese village will be identified by March 14, 2026, as the site of an Israeli strike on a health centre that kills 12 medical workers?" → Burj Qalaouiyah
- "Which team will remain alive through a Women’s World Cup qualifying playoff after losing the AFC Women’s Asian Cup quarterfinal on March 13, 2026?" → North Korea

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (270 resolved, 60 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
